title: Polynomial Long Division
description: Divide one polynomial by another using long division algorithm
mermaid: graph TD A1[Input: Dividend Polynomial (P(x))] --> B1["Input: Divisor Polynomial (D(x))"] B1 --> C1["Is D(x) = 0?"] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 C1 -- Yes --> D1["Error: Division by zero"] style D1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff C1 -- No --> E1["Ensure Dividend Degree >= Divisor Degree"] style E1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 E1 --> F1["Current Quotient = 0"] style F1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff F1 --> G1["Current Remainder = P(x)"] style G1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff G1 --> H1["Find term to multiply D(x) by to match the leading term of Current Remainder"] style H1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff H1 --> I1["New Quotient Term = (Leading Term of Remainder) / (Leading Term of Divisor)"] style I1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff I1 --> J1["Current Quotient = Current Quotient + New Quotient Term"] style J1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff J1 --> K1["New Remainder = Current Remainder - (New Quotient Term * D(x))"] style K1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff K1 --> L1["Current Remainder = New Remainder"] style L1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff L1 --> M1["Is Degree(Current Remainder) < Degree(D(x))?"] style M1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 M1 -- No --> H1 M1 -- Yes --> N1["Quotient = Current Quotient"] style N1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff N1 --> O1["Remainder = Current Remainder"] style O1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff O1 --> P1(Output: Quotient Polynomial) style P1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff P1 --> Q1(Output: Remainder Polynomial) style Q1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
entities: "Find term to multiply D(x) by to match the leading term of Current Remainder"
"New Quotient Term = (Leading Term of Remainder) / (Leading Term of Divisor)"
"Current Quotient = Current Quotient + New Quotient Term"
"New Remainder = Current Remainder - (New Quotient Term * D(x))"
/"Output: Quotient Polynomial"/)style P1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff P1 --> Q1(/"Output: Remainder Polynomial"/
